assumptions.text:
System assumes configuration state: ENCRYPTION & CONFIGURATION

All data is encrypted at rest using AES-256.
System assumes configuration state: Data in transit is encrypted using TLS 1.2 or higher.
System assumes configuration state: Encryption keys are managed by AWS KMS.
